rationale.R1.1: The contribution claim conflates in-distribution accuracy gains with OOD robustness; the framing needs reconstruction to honestly scope what is demonstrated.
rationale.R1.2: A central logical gap exists: the method is motivated and positioned as improving OOD robustness, but all reported metrics are in-distribution top-1 accuracy on standard test sets—no OOD benchmarks (e.g., ImageNet-C, DomainNet) are presented. This undercuts the core argument.
rationale.R1.3: Claims of 'substantially improves OOD robustness' and positioning as a solution to distribution shift are not backed by any OOD evidence in the artifact; evidence-claim alignment is broken.
rationale.R1.6: Prose is serviceable but not compelling; 'stronger' plausibly includes elevating rhetorical impact, sharpening hedges, and tightening transitions.
